emergency_definition: refrigerant leak with hissing sound and HVAC system making loud banging noises

emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Leave voicemail and assure caller of callback within 15 minutes

non_emergency_routing_rules: now includes: offer the caller the option to schedule online at their website or via text message

emergency.fallback: Leave voicemail and assure caller of callback within 15 minutes

routing_rules.non_emergency: now includes: offer the caller the option to schedule online at their website or via text message

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails: I'm sorry, I wasn't able to connect you. Can I take your name and number so someone can call you back shortly?

after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine if emergency, if yes collect name/number/address and attempt dispatch, if no take message and assure next-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller, determine purpose, collect name and number, schedule appointment or transfer to team member, confirm next steps, close.
service_area: the greater Atlanta metro area including Marietta
pricing_model: now includes membership pricing — maintenance plan members get 15% off all repairs
greeting_style: Thanks for calling Comfort Zone HVAC! You've reached our service line. How may I assist you today?
call_objective: to book diagnostic visits and convert callers into annual maintenance plan members at $199/year
objection_handling: not sure if repair or replace
scheduling_preferences: prioritize morning appointments, offer text message confirmation
follow_up_procedure: send email summary within 2 hours of the service call, then call customer 3 days later to check satisfaction
other_tools: Google Workspace and Mailchimp for marketing
notes: current promotion is $49 diagnostic fee (normally $99) for new customers. Always mention this on every call.
